title: Section 6
content: As from the appointed day, there shall be formed a 1[Union territory] to be known as the Laccadive, Minicoy and Amindivi Islands comprising the Laccadive and Minicoy Islands in the Malabar district and the Amindivi Islands in the South Kanara district; and thereupon the said Islands shall cease to form part of the existing State of Madras.
footnote: 1. Subs., ibid., for "New Part C State".
